name: bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks tool
description: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounts receivable reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual reconciliation processes are time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual reconciliation processes are time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounts receivable reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
